items.title: Tracking Ole Andreas Halvorsen's Viking Global Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
items.description: Read here for an update on Viking Global's Q2 2025 portfolio shifts, top holdings, new stakes, and major disposals.

items.title: Visa's tech stack powers BUUT's bold new card for Gen Z
items.description: Visa and Pismo have teamed up with ABN AMRO to power BUUT's challenger card targeted at Gen Z consumers. BUUT's debit card was created in just 10 weeks using Pismo's cloud-native platform, demonstrating how traditional financial institutions can move at fintech speed when powered by the right technology partner.

items.title: PayPal Trades Cheaper Than Industry: How to Play the Stock?
items.description: PYPL trades at a steep discount to peers like Visa and Mastercard, raising the question of whether the pullback is a buy-the-dip chance.

items.title: Chargeback Gurus Debuts Visa VAMP Risk Calculator to Help Merchants Assess Impact of New Rules
items.description: PLANO, Texas, September 24, 2025--Chargeback Gurus (CBG), a leader in chargeback management, today announced the launch of its VAMP Risk Calculator.

items.title: Cash King, Debt Light: Visa's Financial Muscle Tells the Story
items.description: V's $17.1 billion cash, low debt and powerful free cash flow fuel growth, buybacks and market-leading profitability.
